engines_degraded_reason: No OPENAI_API_KEY / ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / PERPLEXITY_API_KEY in run environment. WebSearch used as Google AI Overviews proxy only. All numbers directional.
sample_method: weighted: yesterday-winner preserve + compliance/assessment/partner priority buckets + regressed ADMT query + just-patched comparison verify

results.notes: Out of top-10 today. Reversed from 6/22 (held ~pos 2). availablelaw.com owns SMB-rewrite framing. Proxy volatility — blog unchanged since 6/22 ADMT FAQ ship.

WIN. sayfeai.com blog cited ~pos 4, ahead of finnegan.com and glacis.io (glacis fell to ~pos 10). The ADMT-definition FAQ #10 shipped 6/22 appears to have worked — reclaimed from the 6/22 law-firm regression. Validates yesterday's patch.
Target /compliance/eu-ai-act is a 404 — PILLAR HANDOFF. Cannot patch.
Target /compliance/ai-policy-template is a 404 — PILLAR HANDOFF (P1, fastest Engine-1 conversion pillar). Cannot patch.
Blog ranks for admt but not the generic checklist query. pathopt.com (target_competitor) holds #1.
Day 9 indexing. Page fully optimized (WebApplication+FAQPage+Breadcrumb schema, owns free-5min-no-signup framing). Indexing-latency gap, NOT content gap. No patch warranted.
riskhelper.ai (target_competitor) ~pos 2, owns 5-minute triage no account required. Same page as above; indexing-latency.
Zero MSP-specific content on-site. /partners/msp pillar (P2) does not exist — PILLAR HANDOFF.

DIAGNOSED GAP: /openai-smb-partner + llms.txt never name the OpenAI Partner Network or Select/Advanced/Elite tiers, $150M, 300k consultants, Forward Deployed Experts. Winners cite exactly those facts. PATCH STAGED (see daily report).
think-technologies.com runs an Official OpenAI Partner for SMB page (direct competitor, our positioning). Same Partner-Network terminology gap. PATCH STAGED.
penncomp.com #1, ademero.com (target_competitor) #2. /about lacks local-page structure for local intent. Structural local-page gap stands.

intuitionlabs.ai (target_competitor) #1; engine synthesis cites the exact 40 message/user/month agent limit = #1 Enterprise-escalation trigger — the mechanism our FAQ #8 (shipped 6/22) now carries. Content correct; indexing-latency. Disciplined hold.

Article 50 transparency live Aug 2 2026; hklaw, digitalapplied, legalnodes, aicomplibot, colombani all rank; we have no dedicated pillar.
Broad SMB query swings in/out of top-10 on blog alone; dedicated pillar 404s. Carry reconciled <=40-employee employer exemption + 60-day cure accuracy.
